mapper.select: SELECT order_id as orderId, member_id as memberId, total_amount as totalAmount, order_status as orderStatus, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM Orders WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT order_id as orderId, member_id as memberId, total_amount as totalAmount, order_status as orderStatus, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM Orders WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY order_id DESC

SELECT oi.order_item_id as orderItemId, oi.order_id as orderId, oi.book_id as bookId, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price as unitPrice, b.title as bookTitle FROM Order_Items oi JOIN Books b ON oi.book_id = b.book_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Orders (member_id, total_amount, order_status) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{totalAmount}, #{orderStatus})
INSERT INTO Order_Items (order_id, book_id, quantity, unit_price) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{bookId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice})
